Danielle Keenan

Head of People & Community

empathetic and culturally sensitive diplomatically direct skilled negotiator people-focused organised

Areas of Expertise

  • FIFO workforce wellbeing
  • Traditional Owner engagement protocols
  • diversity and inclusion in mining
  • community benefit agreements
  • recruitment and onboarding
  • performance management
  • employment law and compliance
  • workforce planning

For Other Topics

  • Operations: speak with Karen Whitfield
  • Environment: speak with Dr. Ravi Mehta
  • Site_management: speak with Pete Drummond
  • Safety: speak with Brooke Lawson

Schedule an Interview

You need to book an appointment before speaking with Danielle Keenan.
